---
title: "Data_clean_02_2026"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
#CN data



cn_numeric_cols <- c(
  "Carbon Average", "Nitrogen Average",
  "Carbon Std. Dev.", "Nitrogen Std. Dev."
)

clean_cn_base <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(`Carbon Average`),
      `Carbon Average` != "Carbon",
      `Carbon Average` != "Carbon Average"
    )
}

clean_cn_numeric <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(
      any_of(cn_numeric_cols),
      ~ as.numeric(str_remove(as.character(.x), "%"))
    ))
}

# --- safely extract a date string from whatever column exists
add_analysis_date <- function(df) {
  date_col <- case_when(
    "Date" %in% names(df) ~ "Date",
    "Analysis Date" %in% names(df) ~ "Analysis Date",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  if (is.na(date_col)) {
    return(df %>% mutate(analysis_date = as.Date(NA)))
  }

  df %>%
    mutate(
      analysis_date_raw = as.character(.data[[date_col]]),
      # works for "6/16/2025" AND "1/7/2026 4:03:26 PM"
      analysis_date = suppressWarnings(mdy(analysis_date_raw)),
      analysis_date = if_else(
        is.na(analysis_date),
        as.Date(suppressWarnings(mdy_hms(analysis_date_raw))),
        analysis_date
      )
    ) %>%
    select(-analysis_date_raw)
}

# ---- read
perry_CN_2025_raw <- read_csv("../data_do_not_push/CN data/11.5.25.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
perry_CN_2026_raw <- read_csv("../data_do_not_push/CN data/Madelyn_01_to_02_2026_run.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- clean 2025
perry_CN_2025 <- perry_CN_2025_raw %>%
  clean_cn_base() %>%
  clean_cn_numeric() %>%
  filter(!Type %in% c("Blank", "Standard")) %>%
  add_analysis_date() %>%
  transmute(
    Name, Type, analysis_date,
    `Carbon Average`, `Nitrogen Average`,
    `Carbon Std. Dev.`, `Nitrogen Std. Dev.`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = 2025,
    sample_id = paste0("240", str_pad(as.character(Name), width = 3, pad = "0")),
    sample_group = "240_surface"
  )

# ---- clean 2026
perry_CN_2026 <- perry_CN_2026_raw %>%
  clean_cn_base() %>%
  clean_cn_numeric() %>%
  filter(!Type %in% c("Blank", "Standard")) %>%
  add_analysis_date() %>%
  transmute(
    Name, Type, analysis_date,
    `Carbon Average`, `Nitrogen Average`,
    `Carbon Std. Dev.`, `Nitrogen Std. Dev.`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = 2026,
    sample_id = as.character(Name),
    sample_group = case_when(
      str_detect(sample_id, "^240") ~ "240_surface",
      str_detect(sample_id, "Ap|AP|ap") ~ "Ap_horizon",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  )

# ---- bind + final tidy output
perry_CN_final <- bind_rows(perry_CN_2025, perry_CN_2026) %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id,
    year,
    sample_group,
    C_pct = `Carbon Average`,
    N_pct = `Nitrogen Average`,
    C_sd  = `Carbon Std. Dev.`,
    N_sd  = `Nitrogen Std. Dev.`,
    C_N_ratio = C_pct / N_pct,
    analysis_date
  ) %>%
  #filter where analysis date is not NA
  filter(!is.na(analysis_date)) %>%
  select(sample_id, year, sample_group, C_pct, N_pct,C_N_ratio, analysis_date)

#row 404-414 are surface samples, set aside:
perry_CN_surface_2026  <- perry_CN_final %>%
  #filter to rows 404-414
  slice(404:414)

perry_CN_surface_2025 <- perry_CN_final %>%
  #filter out rows 404-414
  slice(1:315)

#combine:
perry_CN_surface <- bind_rows(perry_CN_surface_2025, perry_CN_surface_2026) %>%
#remove sample ids: 240leco edta, 240std,and any id longer than 250000.
  filter(!sample_id %in% c("240leco edta", "240std")) %>%
  filter(as.numeric(sample_id) < 250000) %>%
  #set ID as numeric:
  mutate(sample_id = as.numeric(sample_id)) %>%
  #set 240658 as C pct 0.52%	N pct 0.03% and 240648 as C pct 0.61%	N pct 0.03%
  mutate(
    C_pct = case_when(
      sample_id == 240658 ~ 0.52,
      sample_id == 240648 ~ 0.61,
      TRUE ~ C_pct
    ),
    N_pct = case_when(
      sample_id == 240658 ~ 0.03,
      sample_id == 240648 ~ 0.03,
      TRUE ~ N_pct
    )
  )

```

```{r}
#perry_soil_points_surface
perry_soil_points_surface <- read.csv("../data_do_not_push/perry_soil_points_surface.csv")
#match ID to perry_CN_surface sample_id:

perry_CN_surface_final <- perry_CN_surface %>%
  inner_join(perry_soil_points_surface, by = c("sample_id" = "ID")) %>%
  #filter out column year and sample_group
  select(-year, -sample_group)

#filter where C is negative:
perry_CN_surface_fails <- perry_CN_surface_final %>%
  filter(C_pct <= 0)
perry_CN_surface_fails

#plot perry_CN_surface_final on map
library(ggplot2)
#scale carbon and plot (make scale range from 0 to 5%)
ggplot(perry_CN_surface_final, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = C_pct), size = 3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(0, 2)) +
  labs(title = "Soil Carbon Percentage at Perry Site Surface Samples",
       x = "Longitude",
       y = "Latitude",
       color = "C (%)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
#combine Ap horizon samples, which are all the rows not in CN
perry_CN_Ap <- perry_CN_final %>%
  #filter to rows 404-414
  slice(-404:-414)%>%
  slice(-1:-315) %>%
  select(-sample_group)

perry_Ap_Hz_depths <- read.csv("../data_do_not_push/Perry_FP_Ap_with_depths_cm.csv")
perry_Ap_Hz_points <- read.csv("../data_do_not_push/Ap_results_1_26_26.csv")


# 1) Make a clean key from the points table (extract the first number in Sample)
perry_Ap_Hz_points2 <- perry_Ap_Hz_points %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id_lab = as.integer(str_extract(Sample, "\\d+")),
    Point_from_sample = str_extract(Sample, "P\\d+"),
    Horizon_from_sample = str_extract(Sample, "(?<=-\\s)\\w+$")  # last token
  )

# 2) Make a clean key from the depths table
perry_Ap_Hz_depths2 <- perry_Ap_Hz_depths %>%
  mutate(sample_id_lab = as.integer(Sample.ID.Lab)) %>%
  select(-Sample.ID.Lab)

# 3) If your CN table uses Lab as the id, standardize it too
# (If perry_CN_Ap already has sample_id_lab, skip this mutate)
perry_CN_Ap2 <- perry_CN_Ap %>%
  mutate(sample_id_lab = as.integer(sample_id))

# 4) Join: CN -> depths -> points
perry_CN_Ap_final <- perry_CN_Ap2 %>%
  inner_join(perry_Ap_Hz_depths2, by = "sample_id_lab") %>%
  inner_join(perry_Ap_Hz_points2, by = "sample_id_lab") %>%
  select(-year, -Lab)  # drop if present / unwanted

# 5) Quick checks
nrow(perry_CN_Ap_final)
anti_join(perry_CN_Ap2, perry_Ap_Hz_depths2, by = "sample_id_lab") %>% head()
anti_join(perry_CN_Ap2, perry_Ap_Hz_points2, by = "sample_id_lab") %>% head()


#map out c pct for Ap horizon samples

perry_CN_Ap_final <- perry_CN_Ap_final %>%
 select(sample_id, C_pct, N_pct, LBC.1, LBCeq, Ca, Mg, K, pH.2, P, Zn, Mn) %>%
  #set sample id as numeric
  mutate(sample_id = as.numeric(sample_id))
```

```{r}
full_hz_data_perry <- read_csv("../data_do_not_push/merged_fp_lpsa_02_10_2026_clean.csv")

#merge sample.id.lab with sample_id in perry_CN_Ap_final
full_hz_data_perry2 <- full_hz_data_perry %>%
  mutate(sample_id = as.integer(Sample.ID.Lab)) %>%
  inner_join(perry_CN_Ap_final, by = "sample_id") %>%
  select(-sample_id) %>%
  #filter by LBC not NA
  filter(!is.na(LBC.1))

#last dataset. Has locations:

Ap_locs <- read.csv("../data_do_not_push/Perry_full_profile_points.csv")
#POINT ID is the same as Point from full_hz_data_perry2, so join on that:
# Minimal hygiene: character + trim (does NOT change values)
full_hz_data_perry2_clean <- full_hz_data_perry2 %>%
  mutate(Point = str_trim(as.character(Point)))

Ap_locs_clean <- Ap_locs %>%
  mutate(PointID = str_trim(as.character(Point_ID))) %>%
#keep Point_ID, Point_X, and Point_Y
  select(Point_ID, POINT_X, POINT_Y)
# Merge
perry_Ap_merged <- full_hz_data_perry2_clean %>%
  left_join(
    Ap_locs_clean,
    by = c("Point" = "Point_ID")
  )

#save as .csv:
write_csv(perry_Ap_merged, "../output_do_not_push/perry_Ap_data_full_02_10_2026.csv")
#plot C pct:
ggplot(perry_Ap_merged, aes(x = POINT_X, y = POINT_Y)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = C_pct), size = 3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(0, 2)) +
  labs(title = "Soil Carbon Percentage at Perry Site Ap Horizon Samples",
       x = "Longitude",
       y = "Latitude",
       color = "C (%)") +
  theme_minimal()
#plot pH:
ggplot(perry_Ap_merged, aes(x = POINT_X, y = POINT_Y
)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = pH.2), size = 3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(4, 8)) +
  labs(title = "Soil pH at Perry Site Ap Horizon Samples",
       x = "Longitude",
       y = "Latitude",
       color = "pH") +
  theme_minimal()
```
